documents.text: AI Assistant LLM-based coding assistant managing project specs
Software Developer Developer using know to manage product specs
Software Architect System architect designing and planning software architecture
Product Manager Product manager tracking features and roadmap
Tool Integrator Developer integrating know with other tools and workflows
Query Graph Query product and code structure efficiently
Manage Specifications Create and update spec graphs
Analyze Gaps Identify implementation gaps
Generate Documentation Generate spec documents from graph
Manage Development Tasks Track and organize development tasks using requirements and spec-graph
Architect System Design and document system architecture using graphs
Track Features Monitor feature development progress across phases
Integrate Tools Integrate know with external tools and LLM workflows
CLI Operations Command-line graph management
Graph Validation Validate graph structure and dependencies
Gap Detection Detect missing implementations
Spec Generation Generate markdown specs from graph
LLM Workflows AI-assisted graph operations
Schema-Agnostic Know Enable know to validate against custom LLM-defined schemas instead of hardcoded dependency rules
Graph Embeddings Semantic search layer over spec-graph using vector embeddings for natural language queries and auto-suggestions
Spec Generation Enrichment Enable rich spec generation with lightweight entities, reusable references, and feature-specific metadata
Spec to JSONL Converter Convert spec-graph.json entities into JSONL format with cross-index identifiers for data pipelines
Graph Visualization Visualize spec-graph and code-graph via know viz commands (tree, mermaid, dot, html, fzf)
CLI Commands Command handlers for all CLI operations
Graph Operations Core graph CRUD and query operations
Validation Engine Rule-based graph validation
Spec Templates Template-based spec generation
LLM Integration LLM provider and workflow management
Schema Loader Loads and normalizes schemas from both new and legacy formats
Field Validator Validates entity fields against schema requirements (required/optional fields)
Schema Detector Auto-detects schema path from graph metadata or uses legacy auto-detection
Embedding Generator Generates vector embeddings from graph node text using sentence-transformers MiniLM model
Similarity Search Performs cosine similarity lookups against embedded vectors to find semantically related nodes
Auto Embed Hook Triggers incremental embedding regeneration when graph is modified via add/link/unlink commands
Spec Generator Enhanced SpecGenerator class with helper methods for rich spec generation
Reference Renderer Helper methods for rendering TypeScript, signatures, and other reference types
Metadata Accessor Helper for accessing meta.feature_specs and other metadata sections
Gap Analyzer Component for detecting implementation gaps
Reference Analyzer Component for analyzing reference usage
Visualization Base BaseVisualizer ABC with extract, filter, BFS focus, and VisualizationData dataclass
Visualization Theme Shared color map for entity types with fill, stroke, rich_style, and Graphviz shapes
Tree Renderer RichTreeVisualizer rendering graph as rich.Tree with grouped and focused views
Mermaid Renderer MermaidVisualizer generating flowchart syntax with subgraph clustering and class styling
Load Custom Schema Load and normalize schema from file (new or legacy format)
Validate Entity Fields Validate entity has required fields and no unknown fields per schema
Detect Schema Path Auto-detect schema path from graph metadata or fall back to legacy rules
Embed Graph Generate vector embeddings for all graph nodes and store in embeddings file
Semantic Search Query graph nodes using natural language and return semantically similar results
Suggest Dependencies Recommend potential dependencies for a node based on semantic similarity
Enrich Feature Specs Generate rich feature specifications with metadata, components, operations, and references
Add Entity Add new entities to the graph
Query Dependencies Query entity dependencies (uses, used-by)
List Entities List entities by type or all entities
Manage Links Create and remove dependency links between entities
Show Statistics Display graph statistics and metrics
Validate Structure Validate graph structure and DAG properties
Validate Dependencies Validate dependency rules are followed
Check Cycles Detect circular dependencies
Health Check Comprehensive graph health assessment
Analyze Missing Connections Identify missing connections in dependency chains
Detect Orphaned References Find unused references in the graph
Suggest Connections Recommend missing dependency links
Generate Entity Spec Generate markdown spec for a single entity
Generate Feature Spec Generate comprehensive feature specification
Generate Sitemap Generate sitemap of all interfaces
Execute LLM Chain Run LLM workflow chain on graph data
Call LLM Provider Make API calls to LLM providers
Manage LLM Workflows Configure and manage workflow definitions
Render Tree Render graph as Rich tree in terminal with type filtering, depth limit, and entity focus
Render Mermaid Generate Mermaid flowchart syntax with subgraph clustering and styling
Render DOT Generate Graphviz DOT source and render to SVG/PNG/PDF files
Render HTML Generate interactive PyVis HTML graph with zoom, pan, and hover
Pick Entity via fzf Fuzzy-pick entity with fzf and display its details
Generate Rich Feature Spec Enhanced feature spec generation with all new sections and metadata
Render TypeScript Convert data-model reference to TypeScript interface
Render Signature Format function signature reference as readable string
Get Feature Metadata Access meta.feature_specs for a feature with graceful degradation
Get Component Operations Query graph for operations linked to a component
Get Component File Query source-file reference for component location
Add Entity to Graph Core operation to add a new entity with validation
Get Entity Dependencies Retrieve dependency list for an entity
Create Dependency Link Add a new dependency edge to the graph
Remove Dependency Link Remove a dependency edge from the graph
List Entities by Type List all entities of a specific type
Compute Graph Stats Calculate statistics about the graph
Validate DAG Structure Ensure graph is a valid directed acyclic graph
Check Dependency Rules Verify dependencies follow schema rules
Detect Cycles Find circular dependency chains
Compute Health Score Calculate overall graph health metrics
Find Missing Chains Identify incomplete dependency chains
Compute Completeness Calculate implementation completeness score
Find Orphaned Refs Locate unreferenced entities
Suggest Links Generate link suggestions
Render Entity Template Render markdown template for entity
Generate Interface List Create list of all interfaces
Execute Workflow Chain Execute multi-step LLM workflow
Call Anthropic API Make Anthropic API requests
Call OpenAI API Make OpenAI API requests
Load Workflow Definition Load workflow configuration
Extract Graph Data Read GraphManager, filter by type/focus/depth, return VisualizationData
Focus Subgraph BFS in both directions from focus entity to depth limit
Render Rich Tree Build rich.Tree with type grouping, cycle detection, and focused neighborhood view
Generate Mermaid Syntax Build Mermaid flowchart TD with subgraphs, edges, and classDef styling
